text.tspan: Which countries include measles vaccines in their vaccination
This shows which countries provide and recommend second doses of measles-containing vaccines (MCV2) through
routine services. People may still be able to receive the vaccine if it's not in the routine schedule – it might be optional or
Note: Measles vaccines became available for the first time in 1963.
